author: IshibashiCustomize
description: Saves user-shared web links as local Markdown notes without fetching page content or metadata. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: IshibashiCustomize
manifest.description: Saves user-shared web links as local Markdown notes without fetching page content or metadata.
manifest.name: Ishibashi Web Clipper V2

name: Ishibashi Web Clipper V2

releases.author: ishibashi-c
releases.description:
## Changes

- Add the source URL as a standalone first line in newly created notes.
- Allow Link Card Preview and similar plugins to render the saved source as a card.
- Keep the compact five-property frontmatter and retain `source` as the canonical URL.

## Validation

- TypeScript check passed.
- Production build passed.
- `node --check main.js` passed.
- Distribution ZIP regenerated successfully.
releases.name: Ishibashi Web Clipper V2 1.1.1

releases.author: ishibashi-c
releases.description:
## Highlights

- Streamlined new web clips to five properties: title, source, created, tags, and type.
- Removed duplicated Link body content; the default body now contains Memo only.
- Derived domain and display dates locally instead of storing duplicate properties.
- Moved capture method to local plugin history.
- Added case-insensitive tag deduplication.
- Preserved read compatibility with the earlier webclip-v2 schema.

## Privacy

The plugin continues to make no requests to clipped source pages and stores no automatically fetched descriptions, article bodies, post text, or preview images.

## Compatibility

Requires Obsidian 1.12.0 or later.

releases.author: ishibashi-c
releases.description:
# Changelog

## 1.0.0

First public release of Ishibashi Web Clipper V2.

- Uses the independent plugin ID `ishibashi-web-clipper-next`.
- Saves shared and clipboard URLs without requesting source pages.
- Does not fetch HTML, redirects, Open Graph, Twitter Card, descriptions, images, or article bodies.
- Makes mobile share and clipboard capture URL-only for every website.
- Records capture provenance in each new note.
- Includes duplicate detection, tags, history, and the Web Clip Library.
releases.name: Ishibashi Web Clipper V2 1.0.0
